Name: powershell.exe
CommandLine:
"C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8;
Start-Sleep -Seconds 10
$mutatingPattern = 'npm.*run build|npm run build|scripts[\\/]cachebust|scripts[\\/]inject-internal-links|scripts[\\/]seo-daily-fix|build:deploy|build-dist|git(\.exe)?\s+.*\b(add|restore|reset|clean|checkout|commit|merge|rebase|pull|push)\b'
$mutators = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match $mutatingPattern } | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, CommandLine
$mutators | Format-List | Out-File -FilePath audit-results\v8-mutating-process-check-after-stop.txt -Encoding utf8
$mutators | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 | Out-File -FilePath audit-results\v8-mutating-process-check-after-stop.json -Encoding utf8
$mutators | Format-List
Write-Output \"MUTATOR_COUNT=$(@($mutators).Count)\""
